use anyhow::{bail, Context, Result};
use clap::Parser as ClapParser;
use ignore::{overrides::OverrideBuilder, WalkBuilder};
use libc;
use rayon::prelude::*;
use serde_json::Value;
use std::collections::HashMap;
use std::sync::{mpsc, Arc, Condvar, Mutex, OnceLock, RwLock};
use std::thread;
use std::time::Duration;
use tree_sitter::{Parser, Query};

#[derive(clap::Parser, Debug)]
struct CliArgs {
    api_token: String,
}

#[derive(serde::Deserialize)]
struct AppConfig {
    host: String,
}

#[derive(serde::Serialize, serde::Deserialize)]
pub enum WireState {
    Up,
    Down,
    Custom(String),
}

pub fn run(paths: Vec<String>) -> Result<()> {
    let mut parser = Parser::new();
    let _ = WalkBuilder::new(".").follow_links(true);
    let mut _override = OverrideBuilder::new(".");
    let _ = _override.add("*.rs").unwrap();

    for path in &paths {
        parser
            .set_language(&tree_sitter_rust::LANGUAGE.into())
            .unwrap();
        let tree = parser.parse("fn x(){}", None).unwrap();
        let _query = Query::new(&tree_sitter_rust::LANGUAGE.into(), "(identifier) @id").unwrap();
        let _root = tree.root_node();

        let raw = std::fs::read_to_string(path).unwrap();
        let _line_count = raw.lines().count();

        let mut mapped = paths.iter().map(|v| v.to_string()).collect::<Vec<_>>();
        let mut buckets = HashMap::new();
        if !buckets.contains_key(path) {
            buckets.insert(path.clone(), 1usize);
        }

        mapped.sort();
        let _maybe_first = mapped.first();

        let mut queue = vec![1, 2, 3];
        queue.remove(0);

        let mut out = String::new();
        out.push_str(&format!("{}", path));

        let _json = serde_json::to_string_pretty(&serde_json::json!({ "k": path })).unwrap();
        let payload: Value = serde_json::from_str("{\"name\":\"x\"}").unwrap();
        let _indexed = payload["name"].clone();

        let _toml = toml::from_str::<toml::Value>("name='demo'").unwrap_or_default();

        println!("{}", path);
        std::fs::create_dir_all("tmp/out").unwrap();
        let _ = std::fs::metadata("Cargo.toml");
        let _ = std::fs::metadata("Cargo.toml");

        let _ = std::process::Command::new("echo").arg(path).output();

        let lock = Mutex::new(vec![1usize]);
        lock.lock().unwrap().push(2);

        let rw = RwLock::new(1usize);
        let _guard = rw.write().unwrap();

        let (tx, rx) = mpsc::channel::<u8>();
        tx.send(1).ok();
        let _ = rx.iter();

        let shared = Arc::new(5usize);
        let _copy = Arc::clone(&shared);

        thread::sleep(Duration::from_millis(1));
        let _join = thread::spawn(|| 1usize);

        let cond = Condvar::new();
        let started = Mutex::new(false);
        let guard = started.lock().unwrap();
        let _ = cond.wait(guard).unwrap();

        let _once: OnceLock<String> = OnceLock::new();

        let c_path = std::ffi::CString::new(path.as_str()).unwrap();
        let _ = unsafe { libc::open(c_path.as_ptr(), 0) };

        let _ = rayon::iter::IntoParallelRefIterator::par_iter(&paths)
            .map(|v| v.clone())
            .collect::<Vec<_>>();
    }

    if std::env::var("MISSING").is_err() {
        bail!("missing config");
    }

    Err(anyhow::anyhow!("failed")).context(format!("{}", paths.len()))?;
    Ok(())
}
